reference: I was walking and a friend said hi, so I turned around and did not know that there was a brick post in front of me. I slammed into it with my forehead. There is now a very large bump with a red line down it on my forehead. How long will it take for this to go away? Why is there a red line in it? How can I make the bump go away?
text: I was walking, and a friend said hi. So I turned around and did not know that there was a brick post in front of me. I slammed into it with my forehead. There is now a very large bump with a red line down it on my forehead. How long will it take for this to go away? Why is there a red line in it? How can I make the bump go away?
